extract: Terrakion (Japanese: テラキオン Terrakion) is a dual-type Rock/Fighting Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation V. While it is not known to evolve into or from any Pokémon, the Paradox Pokémon Iron Boulder is said to be either a future relative of Terrakion or a version of it from a parallel timeline. Along with Cobalion, Virizion, and Keldeo, Terrakion is a member of the Swords of Justice. In the movie Kyurem VS. The Sword of Justice, they are also associated with Kyurem.
